variables.notes: R:c. Chose the clean current debt total. Did not add 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' to avoid double counting because 'Short-term borrowings' appears to already represent the aggregate current borrowings. Excluded lease liabilities per rule.
